questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: A solid uniform sphere of mass $M$ and radius $R$ with centre $C$ is isolated in space. If in the sphere a cavity of radius $\frac{R}{2}$ with centre $C_1$ is made, then the potential at a point $P$ at a distance of $2 R$ from centre C is
questions.solution: $\frac{-G M}{2 R}+\frac{G \frac{M}{4}}{\frac{5 R}{2}}=-\frac{2 G M}{5 R}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
